title: Easy Admin Metrics Widget

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Easy Admin Metrics Widget

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(0, 0)' fill='#B7D7CD' stroke='#C06C88' stroke-width='2'>
    <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='none'/>
    <text x='25' y='35' font-size='24' font-family='Arial'>Metrics Widget</text>
    <g transform='translate(40, 80)'>
        <text x='-12' y='0' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Search:</text>
        <rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
        <text x='10' y='20' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Type to search</text>
    </g>
    <g transform='translate(40, 150)'>
        <g transform='translate(0, 0)' fill='#B7D7CD'>
            <text x='-12' y='0' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Toggle:</text>
            <g transform='translate(0, 10)'>
                <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
                <text x='10' y='20' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Button 1</text>
            </g>
            <g transform='translate(120, 0)'>
                <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
                <text x='10' y='20' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Button 2</text>
            </g>
            <g transform='translate(240, 0)'>
                <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
                <text x='10' y='20' font-size='14' font-family='Arial'>Button 3</text>
            </g>
        </g>
    </g>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Search form should have a clear input field and a submit button

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Easy Admin Metrics Widget

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, search form submission, and toggle button functionality.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
